original_question:
Two swimmers, at opposite ends of a 90-foot pool, start to swim the length of the pool, one at the rate of 3 feet per second, the other at 2 feet per second. They swim back and forth for 12 minutes. Find the number of times they pass each other.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
